General.Name: Colour Life Services Group Co
General.Description: Colour Life Services Group Co., Limited provides property management and community services in the People's Republic of China. The company offers services for communities on a commission basis and lump sum basis, pre-delivery services for property developers, and consultancy services for property management companies. It also provides value-added services, including online promotion, sales and rental assistance, engineering, and other services. Colour Life Services Group Co., Limited was founded in 2002 and is based in Shenzhen, China. Colour Life Services Group Co., Limited is a subsidiary of Fantasia Holdings Group Co., Limited.
General.Address: Tower B The Platinum Tower, Shenzhen, China, 518000
